name: 8q22_2_VPS13B_Cohen_region
description: 8q22.2 region containing VPS13B (Cohen syndrome). Flanked by modest SDs that mediate rare exonic and whole-gene deletions in Finnish/Amish founder populations.

architecture.internal_structure: Modest intragenic and flanking SDs at VPS13B; recurrent exon-level deletions documented in Cohen syndrome patients.
